Refactor/replace optimize model (#962)

* refactor: replace aiServiceClient with openAiModelProcessService

- Refactor BotAIServiceImpl to use OpenAiModelProcessService for text generation
- Replace generateText calls with processNonStreaming method
- Add new error code and messages for OpenAI API errors
- Introduce BusinessException handling for OpenAI API failures
- Remove commented-out version existence check in WorkflowReleaseServiceImpl
- Clean up imports and formatting in OpenAiModelProcessServiceImpl
- Comment out SpacePreAuth annotations in ToolBoxController
- Minor JavaDoc and parameter formatting adjustments in ToolBoxService and ToolBoxExportVo

* refactor: integrate OpenAI-compatible AI ability chat service

- Add AI_ABILITY_CHAT configuration to environment and docker-compose files
- Update configuration docs with new AI_ABILITY_CHAT related variables
- Refactor OpenAiModelProcessService to commons module and adjust imports accordingly
- Inject and use OpenAiModelProcessService in PromptService for AI chat interactions
- Remove deprecated sparkApiTool calls, replacing with OpenAiModelProcessService methods
- Add openai-java dependency to commons module and remove from hub module pom.xml

* refactor: move OpenAiModelProcessService to toolkit module

- Removed OpenAiModelProcessService interface from commons module
- Renamed and moved OpenAiModelProcessServiceImpl to toolkit module as OpenAiModelProcessService class
- Updated imports in BotAIServiceImpl and PersonalityConfigServiceImpl to new service location
- Cleaned up redundant imports related to OpenAiModelProcessService
- Ensured service bean injection uses updated package reference

* refactor: enhance OpenAI streaming response handling with structured chat messages

- Introduce ChatResponse objects to encapsulate streaming content
- Add unique chatId for each streaming session
- Track sequence number and sid for each streamed message
- Mark first and subsequent frames with status codes (0 and 1)
- Send final message with isFinish=true and status=2 upon completion
- Handle errors by sending structured error responses as ChatResponse
- Improve stream processing to send messages only if content is not empty
- Maintain backward-compatible SSE streaming interface

* refactor: clean code block markers from streaming content

- Remove "python" string from the first two content sequences
- Strip out triple backticks from all content frames
- Preserve original sequence and status handling for SSE response
- Enhance content processing before sending ChatResponse via SSEEmitterUtil

* fix: correct sequence number handling for OpenAI response processing

- Change sequence counter initial value from 1 to 0 in virtual thread
- Adjust condition to check for sequence 0 and 1 instead of 1 and 2
- Ensure accurate removal of code block markers based on updated sequence numbers

* fix(bot): adjust OpenAI model parameters and clean up sequence processing

- Set temperature to 0.2 for response generation
- Adjust topP parameter to 0.85 for token sampling
- Remove unnecessary empty line in sequence processing loop
- Clarify handling of code block markers based on sequence number

* style: format stream processing for better readability

- Split chained stream operations into multiple lines
- Indented stream pipeline for clearer structure
- Improved code consistency and maintainability

* chore(db): update AI code generation prompt configurations

- Refine 'create' prompt with detailed formatting and dependency constraints
- Enhance 'update' prompt emphasizing code optimization rules and structure
- Modify 'fix' prompt to include error correction instructions and guidelines
- Ensure all prompts specify function name, parameters, and output formatting
- Restrict usage of external Python dependencies and enforce strict output requirements
- Remove markdown formatting from code generation output as per new rules

* docs(deployment): add AI ability configuration to deployment guides

- Add AI_ABILITY_CHAT_BASE_URL, AI_ABILITY_CHAT_MODEL, and AI_ABILITY_CHAT_API_KEY
- Include explanations for platform AI generation capabilities compatible with OpenAI protocols
- Update both English and Chinese deployment guide documents with new environment variables
- Provide optional configuration instructions for AI prompt optimization and agent creation

* refactor: correct content processing in OpenAiModelProcessService response

- Removed unnecessary code block marker removal from content
- Fixed status assignment for the first and subsequent frames
- Set SID and sequence number headers in ChatResponse
- Send ChatResponse with original content without modification
- Ensure sequence counter increments correctly for each response sent

releases.name: Astron Agent v1.0.2
releases.body:
## What's Changed

### ✨ New Features
- remove auth check from import/export endpoints
- enhance RPA setup with new services and configurations (#921)
- add auto database creation and improve migration lock mechanism

### 🐛 Fixes
- restore mypy ignore-missing-imports flag
- code quality and aiohtpp client bug fix

### 🔧 Improvements
- introduce DatabaseConfig for DB config
- optimize packet guiding exceptions
- exclude enterprise watchdog feature from mypy checks

## What's Changed
* fix(aitools): code quality and aiohtpp client bug fix by @zijian2 in https://github.com/iflytek/astron-agent/pull/911
* chore: exclude enterprise watchdog feature from mypy checks by @hygao1024 in https://github.com/iflytek/astron-agent/pull/912
* 添加插件导入导出功能 by @Xxbys752521 in https://github.com/iflytek/astron-agent/pull/913
* feat: add auto database creation and improve migration lock mechanism by @cumthxy in https://github.com/iflytek/astron-agent/pull/910
* fix(ci): restore mypy ignore-missing-imports flag by @cumthxy in https://github.com/iflytek/astron-agent/pull/924
* feat(docker): enhance RPA setup with new services and configurations by @doctorbruce in https://github.com/iflytek/astron-agent/pull/921
* feat(toolkit): remove auth check from import/export endpoints by @Xxbys752521 in https://github.com/iflytek/astron-agent/pull/926


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/iflytek/astron-agent/compare/v1.0.1...v1.0.2

## What's Changed

- Add console backend auto-create DB param to default datasource URL

### 🔧 Improvements
- refactor aitools, optimize performance, abstract infrastructure, organize and categorize tools

- async-first rewrite with auto-OSS tracing, HTTP session pooling, RPA ext params & stream resource fixes

readme_html:
English | 简体中文

🔭 What is Astron Agent

Astron Agent is an enterprise-grade, commercial-friendly Agentic Workflow development platform that integrates AI workflow orchestration, model management, AI and MCP tool integration, RPA automation, and team collaboration features. The platform supports high-availability deployment, enabling organizations to rapidly build scalable, production-ready intelligent agent applications and establish their AI foundation for the future.

Why Choose Astron Agent?

  • Stable and Reliable: Built on the same core technology as the iFLYTEK Astron Agent Platform, providing enterprise-grade reliability with a fully available high-availability version open source.
  • Cross-System Integration: Natively integrates intelligent RPA, efficiently connecting internal and external enterprise systems, enabling seamless interaction between Agents and enterprise systems.
  • Enterprise-Grade Open Ecosystem: Deeply compatible with various industry models and tools, supporting custom extensions and flexibly adapting to diverse enterprise scenarios.
  • Business-Friendly: Released under the Apache 2.0 License, with no commercial restrictions, allowing free commercial use.

Key Features

  • Enterprise-Grade High Availability: Full-stack capabilities for development, building, optimization, and management. Supports one-click deployment with strong reliability.
  • Intelligent RPA Integration: Enables cross-system process automation, empowering Agents with controllable execution to achieve a complete loop “from decision to action.”
  • Ready-to-Use Tool Ecosystem: Integrates massive AI capabilities and tools from the iFLYTEK Open Platform, validated by millions of developers, supporting plug-and-play integration without extra development.
  • Flexible Large Model Support: Offers diverse access methods, from rapid API-based model access and validation to one-click deployment of enterprise-level MaaS (Model as a Service) on-premises clusters, meeting needs of all scales.

📰 News

🔄 Ongoing

  • Astron Agent & RPA · Hefei Meetup 🎤 @lyj715824 @doctorbruce

📅 Past

  • Astron Hackathon @ 2025 iFLYTEK Global 1024 Developer Festival 🎤 @mklong
  • Astron Agent Zhengzhou Meetup 🎤 @lyj715824 @wowo-zZ
  • Astron on Campus @ Zhejiang University of Finance and Economics 🎤 @lyj715824
  • Astron Agent & RPA · Qingdao Meetup Brings Agentic AI! 🎤 @vsxd @doctorbruce @MaxwellJean
  • Astron Training Camp · Cohort #1 🎤 @lyj715824 @Thomas1024-Astron @abelzha
  • Astron Talk @ Chongqing Mini Tech Fest 🎤 @lyj715824
  • Astron Agent @ MWC Barcelona 2026

🚀 Quick Start

We offer two deployment methods to meet different scenarios:

Option 1: Docker Compose (Recommended for Quick Start)

# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/iflytek/astron-agent.git

# Navigate to the Docker deployment directory
cd docker/astronAgent

# Copy environment configuration
cp .env.example .env

# Configure environment variables
vim .env

For environment variable configuration, please refer to the documentation:DEPLOYMENT_GUIDE_WITH_AUTH.md

# Start all services (including Casdoor)
docker compose -f docker-compose-with-auth.yaml up -d

📊 Service Access Addresses

After startup, you can access the services at the following addresses:

Authentication Service

  • Casdoor Admin Interface: http://localhost:8000

AstronAgent

  • Application Frontend (nginx proxy): http://localhost/

Note

  • Default Casdoor login credentials: username: admin, password: 123

Option 2: Helm (For Kubernetes Environments)

🚧 Note: Helm charts are currently under development. Stay tuned for updates!

# Coming soon
# helm repo add astron-agent https://iflytek.github.io/astron-agent
# helm install astron-agent astron-agent/astron-agent

📖 For complete deployment instructions and configuration details, see Deployment Guide

📖 Using Astron Cloud

Try Astron：Astron Cloud provides a ready-to-use environment for creating and managing Agents. Get quick access at https://agent.xfyun.cn.

Using Guide：For detailed usage instructions, please refer to Quick Start Guide.
